name: Industry Research
description_en: Map an industry's full value chain and apply the four-masters stock-analysis framework to its key companies.
description_zh: 绘制行业全产业链图谱，并对关键公司应用四大师个股分析框架。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It scans an industry's upstream/downstream structure, competitive dynamics, and civilization-level trends, then evaluates representative companies with Buffett/Munger/Duan/Li Lu criteria.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。扫描行业的上下游结构、竞争格局与文明级趋势，然后用巴菲特/芒格/段永平/李录标准评估代表性公司。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools and performs web searches for industry data. No external accounts required.
sec_note_zh: 会运行本地 Python 工具，并执行网络搜索获取行业数据。无需外部账号。
